channel.title: Version Control on Adventures in Data Science
channel.description: Recent content in Version Control on Adventures in Data Science

item.title: Git to the Rescue
item.description: What I love about blogdown is the way it almost everything I am learing in this project: R, documentation, version control, data as storytelling. My only issue with it is when something bad happens. This is more a question of familiarity than one of difficulty. For instance, if something broke on one of my old wordpress sites, if I couldn’t diagnose and fix the issue quickly, I have friends and, in some cases, a dedicated tech support team to help me fix it.
